title: NoPumpkinBlur
description: NoPumpkinBlur” is a clear and effective name for a Minecraft resource pack that removes the pumpkin overlay effect when wearing a carved pumpkin.
body:
ClearView Pumpkin Overlay Remover

Experience Minecraft with enhanced clarity and immersion! This simple yet effective mod removes the annoying pumpkin overlay that appears whenever you wear a pumpkin on your head. No more obstructed vision or distracting textures blocking your view during exploration, builds, or battles.

Features:

  • Overlay Removal: Completely disables the classic pumpkin blur effect for a clean, unobstructed screen.
  • Lightweight & Minimal: No performance impact—just a subtle quality-of-life improvement.
  • Seamless Compatibility: Works with any resource pack or mod that uses the standard pumpkin overlay texture.
  • Easy Installation: Drop it in your mods folder and enjoy instantly.

Whether you're into creative building or hardcore survival, this mod lets you wear pumpkins without losing sight of your beautiful Minecraft world.

Clear your view and keep the fun!
